welcome.title: Welcome to Talentiv Learning 👋
welcome.body: Let's take a quick tour of the features available for your role. It only takes a minute — you can replay it anytime from your profile menu.

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.body: This is your home base. See your enrolled programs, track progress, and jump back into your next lesson.

curriculum.title: Lessons
curriculum.body: Browse the full curriculum here. Each session includes learning materials, a live class, and hands-on exercises.

playground.title: Playground
playground.body: Practice freely without grading — run SQL and Python on real datasets, or try the calculators and simulators.

programs.title: Program Management
programs.body: Manage cohorts, schedule sessions, assign mentors, review students, and monitor mentor performance.

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.body: The command center: overview stats, cohorts, analytics, feedback, content reports, and program-manager assignments.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.body: Mentions and updates from discussions show up here. The badge tells you how many are unread.

user.title: Profile & Menu
user.body: Manage your profile, switch language, and find quick links. You can restart this tour or open the full feature guide from here anytime.

finish.title: You're all set! 🎉
finish.body: That's the tour. Want the details? Open the full feature guide for a page that explains everything available to you.

guide.title: Feature Guide
guide.subtitle: Everything available for your role, in one place.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Your landing page after signing in. Shows the programs you're enrolled in, your progress through each cohort, your next lesson, and prompts to give feedback on live sessions.

curriculum.title: Lessons & Sessions
curriculum.desc: The full curriculum, organized into phases and sessions. Open a session to read the materials, join or watch the live class, and complete its exercises. Lessons unlock on their scheduled dates.

exercises.title: Exercises
exercises.desc: Graded hands-on tasks inside each session — SQL queries, quizzes, multiple-choice, and matching. Submit to get instant test feedback, hints, and a score.

playground.title: Playground
playground.desc: A no-stakes sandbox to practice. Run SQL and Python on sample datasets, and use the extra tools — net salary calculator, overtime calculator, XLOOKUP simulator, and OKR builder.

discussion.title: Discussion & Notifications
discussion.desc: Ask questions and reply within sessions. Mention classmates or mentors with @, and get notified in the bell menu when someone responds to you.
discussion.where: Inside sessions · bell icon in nav

feedback.title: Session Feedback
feedback.desc: After each live session you'll be prompted to rate the materials, the mentor, and your overall experience. Your input shapes future sessions.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.desc: Once you complete a program and pass review, your certificate appears here. View it, share the public verification link, or print it as a PDF.

profile.title: Profile & Settings
profile.desc: Update your name, switch between English and Indonesian, reset your password, and restart this walkthrough whenever you need a refresher.

content_editing.title: Content Editing
content_editing.desc: As a mentor you can edit lesson materials and exercises directly from the session page, keeping content accurate and up to date.

program_management.title: Program Management
program_management.desc: Manage a program end to end: create and configure cohorts, schedule sessions with Zoom links and recordings, assign mentors, review student pass/fail status, and track mentor performance from feedback.

student_review.title: Student Review
student_review.desc: Review each student's progress in a cohort and mark them pass or fail. Passing students become eligible for their certificate.

admin_console.title: Admin Console
admin_console.desc: Platform-wide control: an overview of key stats, cohort management, exercise and feedback analytics, content issue reports, and assigning program managers.

user_management.title: User Management
user_management.desc: View all users, inspect an individual's activity and progress, and manage roles across the platform.
